rationale: The pair is topically close: the citing paper analyzes private-label umbrella rebranding and its effects on price/promotion/assortment effectiveness, while the cited paper examines economy/premium private-label portfolio introductions and brand-choice effects in grocery retail with similar marketing variables. This suggests the cited work is a plausible substantive prior benchmark/theory source on private-label tier dynamics rather than an incidental mention. Given this overlap, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
